description:
Perform a fluid-structure interaction assessment to determine blade deflection for the 'HAWT_Test.wpa' project (/home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/). Analyze the static deflection and root moment resulting from aerodynamic loads at a wind speed of 12 m/s. Record the results in a report at '/home/ga/Documents/deflection_report.txt' using this exact format:

Wind Speed: 12 m/s
Max Deflection: <value> m
Root Moment: <value> Nm
